arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Bochum: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich put out a masterclass against Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League, taking a 3-0 advantage into the second leg. Bayern will line up with a heavily rotated squad since they will play the second leg against Bayer Leverkusen straight after.

arts.ttl: Transfer Rumor: Kingsley Coman expected to leave Bayern Munich this summer
arts.sum: Still, though, since his current contract with the club runs through June 2027, this summer would be a good time to offload him for the value they can still get, and he was very close to going to Saudi Arabia already in last summer’s transfer window . Per information from Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg (via @iMiaSanMia ), Coman is actively planning to leave Bayern Munich this summer and the club would not stand in his way.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich to go all-out to get Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz this summer
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich is “doing everything” to get Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz this summer: Bayern are doing everything to sign Florian Wirtz this summer.

arts.ttl: Why Sven Ulreich wasn’t on the bench for Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: In the aftermath, though, his usual deputy Sven Ulreich made his way not onto the field but from the stands into the bench — all despite being a part of Vincent Kompany’s matchday squad. Bayern Munich fans may have caught a curious sight in the confusion of Manuel Neuer’s injury substitution in Wednesday’s 3-0 Champions League win over Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Report: Leroy Sané will only be extended at Bayern Munich with a significant wage reduction
arts.sum: Leroy Sané has seen lots of highs and lows during his time at Bayern Munich . Leroy Sané is still in demand at Bayern Munich, but for a significantly reduced wage.
